## Bug Report / Feature Request

**Type:** Bug / Feature / Selector Update

---

### For Bug Reports

**X.com URL where issue occurs:**
<!-- Paste the URL of the page where the extension isn't working correctly -->

**What happened:**
<!-- Describe the issue -->

**What you expected:**
<!-- What should have happened instead -->

**Extracted output (if any):**
<!-- Paste relevant output, or "no output" if extraction failed -->

**Browser:** Chrome version X.X.X
**Extension version:** (visible in the popup header)
**OS:**

### For Selector Updates

**Which element is no longer being captured?**
<!-- e.g., "tweet text", "engagement counts", "quoted tweets" -->

**Current selector in SELECTORS object:**
<!-- The old selector that's broken -->

**Proposed new selector:**
<!-- The working selector you found via DevTools -->

**Tested on:** (list URLs you tested)

### For Feature Requests

**What would you like the extension to do?**

**Does this align with the Four Beats?** (See DESIGN_PHILOSOPHY.md)
<!-- See → Click → Done → Paste. Does your feature interrupt these beats? -->

**Should this be visible by default or behind the gear icon?**
